text.title: Change Control Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project baselined (scope + schedule + cost) with a CCB?

conclusion.verdict: Use backlog re-ordering for agile work

branch.when: baselined == true AND cr_written == true AND impact_analysis_done == false
baselined == true AND cr_written == true AND impact_analysis_done == true

conclusion.verdict: Convene CCB with quorum; log decision

example.trace: baselined=true → cr_written=true → impact_analysis_done=true → CCB approves → baseline updated.
